name: ringBuffer
description: Template ring buffer for Arduino/ESP: aligned storage per slot, trivially-copyable T, optional critical sections, FIFO + random-access slot API (peekAt/pokeAt/cursor), Unity tests
documentation: O(1) FIFO, static storage, no heap in queue ops. T must be trivially copyable; aligned_storage per slot. Thread safety: ESP32 spinlock, ESP8266 noInterrupts; optional RINGBUFFER_DISABLE_THREAD_SAFETY. Embedded: IRAM_ATTR on push only (ESP32); avoid Serial/verbose in ISR; bounded critical section (~memcpy of T); pop/peek use caller stack for T. C++11+ type_traits. Unity tests in test/.
